notes: Implemented core policy/config abstractions, a first-match-wins policy engine, YAML loaders, event records, and approval/interceptor interfaces.
Added six unit tests covering rule order, command glob alternation, port ranges, default deny behavior, YAML policy parsing, and configuration loading.
testsPassing is false because dotnet test could not run in this environment: global.json requires SDK 9.0.100 and no .NET SDK is installed.
